subcodes.first_line: O beloved friends! I fervently supplicate the Abhá Kingdom and earnestly entreat the Most Exalted Realm of Might to bestow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الاحباء انی اتضرع الی الملکوت الابهی و ابتهل الی الجبروت الاعلی ان یفیض
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
